_comment: EXAMPLE invoicing config (v0.10.0 schema). Copied + filled per firm at onboarding into <workspace>/_firma/config/invoicing.json. All names/values here are synthetic placeholders — no real client data. Keys read by compute.ts: vat_rate, tiers (montage/fahrt per tier), default_tier, zuschlag_samstag, zuschlag_sonntag, weekend_days, people (incl. optional vehicle), vehicles, pflicht_pause_h, daily_cap_total_h, pause_pre_applied, spesen, hotel_cost, kfz_rate_per_km. The rest (mandant, sites, filename_schema, output_paths) are used by the skill, not the math.

vehicles._comment: OPTIONAL — nur noetig, wenn km/Fahrzeugkosten separat als eigene Geraete-Position abgerechnet werden (statt pauschal in den Stundensatz eingepreist). Jede Zeile mit km>0 braucht ein aufloesbares Fahrzeug (row.vehicle oder people[...].vehicle).

sites._comment: OPTIONAL per-site overrides. Omit a site to use the defaults + ask hotel per run. 'match' = how the site appears on timesheets.

output_paths._comment: Where the finished invoice + mirrored timesheet go. Default = workspace _ausgang/. Override with the firm's real folders (path-picker). Patterns may use <KW>/<Jahr>.
